item.name: Cloud-eye Carp
item.description:
Only recently discovered, the traits of this peculiar freshwater fish are yet to be thoroughly studied.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A relatively recent discovery in the pantheon of Turali fauna, there is still much to learn about this mysterious wavekin. Lacking eyes altogether, this fish seems to navigate its environs using an array of other senses.
